functions.epcems_login: Authenticates and opens a session on the EPC/EMS management interface before any UI-level capture operations.
functions.epcems_logout: Closes the active EPC/EMS session cleanly after all capture operations are complete.
functions.epcems_capture_software_patch: Retrieves the current software patch version installed on the EPC/EMS node.
functions.epcems_capture_software_license: Captures the active license details and validity status from the EPC/EMS node.
functions.epcems_capture_subscriber_details: Fetches subscriber profile and session information from the EMS during an active test.
functions.epcems_capture_tal_info: Captures TAL (Tracking Area List) configuration information from the EMS.
functions.epcems_capture_active_peer: Retrieves the list of currently active peer connections visible on the EMS.
functions.epcems_capture_node_snmp_check: Performs an SNMP health check on the EPC node to verify reachability and status.
functions.epcems_capture_node_alarms: Fetches all active and recent alarms raised on the EPC/EMS node.
functions.epcems_capture_performance_monitoring: Captures real-time performance metrics and KPIs from the EMS dashboard.
functions.epcems_capture_resource_stats_reports: Retrieves resource utilization statistics including CPU, memory, and bandwidth from the EMS.
functions.epcems_capture_sls_peer_info: Captures SLs interface peer information used for LBS and location services validation.
functions.epcems_capture_li_self_info: Retrieves Lawful Intercept self-configuration details from the EMS for compliance validation.
functions.preset_mobiles: Applies a predefined configuration profile to all test mobile devices before the test begins.
functions.reset_mobiles: Resets individual mobile devices to their default factory state without affecting other devices.
functions.check_radio: Verifies the current radio access technology and signal state of the connected mobile device.
functions.change_radio: Switches the mobile device to a different radio access technology such as LTE or 5G.
functions.change_wifi: Toggles the WiFi interface on the mobile device on or off.
functions.change_wifi_calling: Enables or disables WiFi calling feature on the mobile device.
functions.change_volte_calling: Enables or disables VoLTE calling capability on the mobile device.
functions.capture_device_health: Captures the current hardware and software health status of the connected mobile device.
functions.packet_capture_start: Initiates network packet recording on the test interface to capture all traffic during the test.
functions.packet_capture_stop: Stops the active packet capture session and saves the recorded traffic to a file.
functions.fetch_packet_capture_logs: Retrieves the saved packet capture log files from the device or server for analysis.
functions.reset_all_mobiles: Resets all connected mobile devices simultaneously to a clean state before starting a test.
functions.connect_mobile: Establishes a connection between the test framework and a physical or virtual mobile device.
functions.disconnect_mobile: Cleanly disconnects the mobile device from the test framework at the end of a test.
functions.print_results: Outputs and logs the final test verdict, results, and summary to the test report.
functions.mo_attach: Triggers a mobile-originated network attach procedure to register the device on the network.
functions.mo_detach: Triggers a mobile-originated network detach procedure to deregister the device from the network.
functions.mo_attach_detach: Executes a combined attach followed by detach cycle in a single operation for stability testing.
functions.mo_mt_voice_call: Executes a complete MO-MT voice call including setup, connection, and termination.
functions.mo_mt_voice_call_start: Initiates a mobile-originated voice call and waits for the mobile-terminated side to answer.
functions.mo_mt_voice_terminate_call: Terminates an active MO-MT voice call from either the originating or terminating side.
functions.conference_voice_terminate_call: Ends an active three-way conference call and releases all participant connections.
functions.mo_mt_video_call_start: Initiates a mobile-originated video call and waits for the mobile-terminated side to answer.
functions.mo_mt_video_terminate_call: Terminates an active MO-MT video call from either the originating or terminating side.
functions.mo_mt_fw_voice_call_waiting: Tests the call waiting feature during an active forwarded voice call scenario.
functions.mo_mt_fw_video_call_waiting: Tests the call waiting feature during an active forwarded video call scenario.
functions.mo_mt_fw_voice_call_start: Initiates a forwarded mobile-originated voice call to test call forwarding functionality.
functions.mo_mt_fw_voice_terminate_call: Terminates an active forwarded voice call and verifies proper call release.
functions.mo_voice_call_start: Initiates a mobile-originated voice call without requiring a mobile-terminated counterpart.
functions.mo_voice_terminate_call: Terminates an active mobile-originated voice call.
functions.mo_merge_call: Merges two active calls into a three-way conference call.
functions.mo_emergency_call: Originates an emergency call to a predefined emergency number such as 112 for compliance testing.
functions.mo_helpline_call: Originates a call to a predefined helpline number to validate helpline routing.
functions.mo_ussd_call: Initiates a USSD session and validates the network response to the USSD string.
functions.mo_mt_p2p_sms: Sends and receives a person-to-person SMS between two test devices and validates delivery.
functions.mo_p2p_sms: Sends a person-to-person SMS from the mobile-originated side only without MT validation.
functions.mo_mt_p2a_sms: Sends a person-to-application SMS and validates delivery to the application endpoint.
functions.mo_file_download: Initiates a file download over the mobile data connection to validate data throughput.
functions.mo_speed_test: Runs an uplink and downlink speed test over the mobile data connection.
functions.mo_browsing: Simulates mobile web browsing to validate end-to-end data path and DNS resolution.
functions.run_command: Executes a custom shell or AT command directly on the connected mobile device.
functions.sanitize_response: Cleans and normalizes the raw output from a run_command execution for further processing.
functions.pcap_parser: Parses the saved packet capture file to extract and analyze protocol-level network data.
functions.add_spacing: Adds formatting spacing to test output for improved readability in reports.
functions.text_to_image2: Converts test result text into an image format for visual reporting.
functions.find_first_ue_attach_deattach: Searches the packet capture for the first UE attach and detach event sequence.
functions.find_first_ue_attach: Searches the packet capture file for the first UE attach event.
functions.search_pcap_file: Searches for and locates a specific packet capture file by name or timestamp for analysis.
